edges.description: Caldera quema al revelar Pírico → Ozom ataca quemados
Ciclo Eterno vivifica Ixim → Marok re-equipa al vivificar
Cretus escala al morir aliado → Hypex escala cuando otros escalan
Boras congela todo + Askame cap 4 daño = grind
Ketzz actualiza aliados + Boras congela rivales
Zona Feral doble daño + Yakerr feraliza rival
Sol y Luna +1 Feral revelado + Shugg daña al revelar Abisal
Jugada Maestra protege equipados + Hundimiento cura equipados
Protección Selectiva niega ataque + Develación no puede ser negada

edges.label: governed_by
CM overrides Nanuk 4dmg to 2dmg — counterproductive
Dagg Apetito overrides Boras Sacrificio negation on Ferales
Burbuja permanent rest lock shuts down Serpiente chain
Serpiente reveal triggers Acecho for 2dmg (Abisal reveal chain)
6dmg Bio kills Serpiente — save for chain-breaker moment
On-reveal abismar neutralizes key control pieces
Abisales on-reveal (AoE 1dmg) + triggers Serpiente chain simultaneously
Caldera Submarina burns all Quam cards — every attack costs HP
Draxes on-reveal 1dmg finished off Burbuja at 1HP
Ozom double dmg (4) when burned cards exist — destroys control pieces
Draxes Planeo self-hide cycle = infinite burn/1dmg source every 2 turns
Draxes Ancestral 6dmg nuke (equip sacrifice) one-shots any Adendei
Nanuk Garras cost (allies in rest+Catrin/Gelido) incompatible with control tempo
Ariam Laser scales +1dmg per Pirica/Ariam in ext (up to 7dmg). Kills rest-control tanks.
Kuron Durmiente cant be attacked by non-Gelido — immune to entire Pirica/Ariam field
Antoine Graham AoE 2dmg to 3 rivals — destroys low-HP control pieces
Nanuk Fiereza immune to marks — burn-proof vs Caldera/Escamas strategy
Burn makes Boras Poder suicidal — attacking at low HP = death from burn self-dmg
Hori +1atk + Ozom double = 6dmg guaranteed one-shot. Best Ariam combo.
Yogg Oscuridad abisma attacker on attack. Forced Ozom oculta 3 times in 1 game.
Sangre Petrea strips ALL equips from ZP. Devastating vs equip-heavy decks like AriamBurn.
Cap Aurex oculta 2 rivals = complete shutdown for 1 turn. Forces Ariam to re-reveal (Caldera re-triggers).
Caldera burns ALL Abismo field by T10. Abismo has 0 burn removal = every attack self-damages.
Ketzz Saliva (+1dmg burned allies) combos with Caldera self-burns for net positive.
Kuron Durmiente invulnerable to entire Abismo deck (all non-Gelido). Never died in 47-turn game.
Burbuja locks Dagg at 2R = removes Feral pasiva protection for 7 turns. Devastating opener.
Enis Estocada all-field +1R on attack = finally enables Nanuk Garras (needs ally in rest). Key enabler.
Sangre Petrea Activa-Rapida strips equips on opponent's turn. Stripped Iceberg+Copal from Boras mid-combat.
Crisantemo on expendable card → select Kuron → card dies → Kuron to ext. Bypasses 'can't be attacked'. Must fire BEFORE Enis Escudo enters field.
Enis Escudo 'no ext by effect' blocks OWN Boras Gigante's revenge-kill. Double-edged protection.
Kumba: sacrifice Bio → send Nanuk Garras to ext. Works after Enis Escudo dead. Second anti-invulnerable.
Yakerr Hogar 6dmg one-shots any Adendei. Must wait 1 turn. THE closer for Abismo.
Jokokan 4dmg kills 3HP targets instantly but self-destructs (descend+1dmg). Worth it as trade piece.
Caldera auto-burns on every Pirica reveal. Tarus Equilibrio is only cleanse. If Tarus dies, Abismo has no answer to burn. Caldera is Abismo's nightmare.
Makua Halcon scales +1dmg per Abisal in own ext. By T32 with 5 Abisals dead = 7dmg! Late-game nuclear option for Abismo decks.
Hori +1atk all Piricas turns entire AriamBurn deck into 3dmg minimum. Combined with Caldera auto-burn = overwhelming aggro engine.
Establo Morfeico counters burn strategy: Equino deaths feed Establo scaling (1-6dmg free per turn). AriamBurn kills Equinos = powers up Establo. Anti-aggro win condition.
Yimsah Veneno: ally death → 2dmg revenge. Combined with Establo, each Wildfire death deals 2+N passive damage. Punishes aggro for killing.
Juan Galgo Vinculo → double dmg to non-adjacent. Combined with 3dmg Yakerr = 6dmg one-shot on Hori. Removing Hori drops entire AriamBurn army by -1atk.
Necroalga blocks ALL effect damage in ZP — completely shuts down Establo Morfeico Bio + death triggers. Without Necroalga strip, Wildfire's win condition is neutralized.
Makua Aguas Feroces: 1dmg + per Feral in field. With 3 Ferales = 4dmg. Scales with FIELD presence not extinction. Was Wildfire's actual closer vs both AriamBurn and Abismo.

edges.note: Serpiente Voraz cost blocks Bio passive (Ruinas Abisales). Massive anti-synergy: delays Ruinas activation until Serpiente dies.
Kaykac cost requires ALL allies Abisal/Atlico. Tarus (Huumica) blocks Kaykac from attacking.
Kaykac cost requires ALL allies Abisal/Atlico. Yakerr Hogar (Chaaktica) blocks Kaykac.
Ruinas Abisales delays non-Abisal reveals from attacking, slowing Wildfire tercia replacements. Direct tempo counter.
Necroalga blocks Establo Morfeico damage (it's effect damage, not attack). Critical defensive tool.
Makua Halcon scales +1dmg per Abisal in ext. With 4 Abisales dead = 6dmg. Late game monster in Abisal-heavy decks.
Ruinas Abisales blocks ALL Wildfire openers T2 (none are Abisal). Full turn tempo advantage confirmed showcase 10.
CONFIRMED: Serpiente Voraz cost blocks Ruinas from T1. v6 without Serpiente = Ruinas active immediately = T2 block.
Xakros Peste mass rest paralyzes entire Abismo field for 2 turns. Negates Makua tempo advantage.
Dagg Reflejos: free equip when Abisal/Feral leaves field. Nenufar auto-equip = sustain without spending equip phase.
Ariam Jugada Maestra: ALL equipped allies immune to effects. Blocks Establo, death triggers, Xakros Peste mass rest. Field-wide Necroalga for equipped cards.
Makua Halcon with 4+ Abisales in ext = 6dmg. Unnegable with Develacion. 2 hits kills Juan Galgo (12PV). Protector rush win condition.
Ruinas Abisales blocks Xakros Peste on reveal turn, preventing mass rest. Critical tempo save confirmed showcase 11.
Jugada Maestra + Necroalga = double layer: Necroalga protects ZP from effects, Jugada protects equipped individually. Redundancy if one carrier dies.
Zaykan Reclutamiento cost (1dmg self before attack) kills itself at low PV. Glass cannon — position early or accept death.
Antoine Graham Activa (2dmg to 3 rivals) is strong board control. But 3R cooldown limits impact vs Establo sustained dmg.
Zoadon Filtracion (0R!) + Cinabrio = always attacks + envenena attacker back. Strong early trade engine.
Ahuehuete on Greah with equips in ext = 4-6dmg. Greah as late-game closer with Ahuehuete scaling.
Voracidad Natural blocks Caldera burn mark on equipped card. Critical for surviving AriamBurn opener. Maquemura with Voracidad = unkillable by effects.

[REVALIDATE - showcases used 3 attacks/turn, correct is 1] Ozom recursion confirmed again: Antoine 2dmg killed Ozom, Ozom returned with 6PV abismado. Killed TWICE in showcase 13, returned both times. Near-unkillable.
Juan Galgo Ceolin (3dmg ZP Activa) outperforms Antoine Graham (2dmg x3, 3R cooldown). JG fires every 3R for 3 targeted dmg vs Antoine 2dmg spread.
Greah Mazo Petreo (0d/0r Titan) + Rots Andantes = Activa 4dmg unnegable every turn. 0R means always available. THE closer for Stone deck.
Hypex Atardecer (2d/0r Titan) + Rots Andantes = 2dmg unnegable constant pressure. No effect but 0R Titan = reliable chip damage every turn.
Greah Terremoto (Titan) + Rots Andantes: if revealed while Bio active, Titan passive grants double dmg unnegable. Late-game power spike.
Zoadon (0R desvio, absorbs 1dmg from each ally attacked) + Maquemura (A-R blocks rival effects) = tanky opening pair. Zoadon protects Maquemura, Maquemura blocks triggers.
Zaykan Cisma: when attacked, 1dmg to Protector rival. Passive Protector chip. Over 5+ turns = 5+ free dmg to Protector. Protector Rush enabler.
Adasi Acecho death trigger: 1dmg to ALL rival Adendei. Anti-aggro AoE — punishes opponent for killing. Pairs well with sacrifice strategies.
Nodkh Abismo Petreo: if protected, free equip in Previa. Proteccion Selectiva protects on attack (negates) which triggers Nodkh equip engine. Self-sustaining loop.
Jokokan (4d) + Expulsion de Energia ICARO: on attack, bonus dmg to another rival card. Total 4+2=6 effective dmg spread across 2 targets.
Adasi Amparo (+1dmg per equip on field) + Voracidad Natural (immune to effects) = immune scaling threat. The more equips you play, the stronger AND safer she gets.

[REVALIDATE - showcases used 3 attacks/turn, correct is 1] Makua Halcon (+1dmg per Abisal in ext) + Develacion (unnegable) = THE win condition for Abismo. With 4 Abisales dead = 6dmg unnegable. 2 hits kills any Protector. Confirmed showcase 11.

[REVALIDATE - showcases used 3 attacks/turn, correct is 1] Tarus Equilibrio cleaned ALL burn marks T4 in showcase 14. But one-shot cleanup — when Kitse re-burns T10, Tarus already dead. Need Tarus to survive or second mark removal.
Greah Mazo Petreo needs 2 Rot in ext for Activa. ICARO Armaduras sacrifice (Rot) enables it mid-game. Plan: sacrifice ICARO T13 → Greah Activa T14+.
[REVALIDATE - showcases used 3 attacks/turn, correct is 1] Adasi Acecho death trigger (1dmg ALL rivals) killed Calisto at 1PV in showcase 14. Punishes opponent for killing low-priority cards.

Caldera burns on reveal. But burn dmg only triggers when burned card ATTACKS or uses Activa — not passively. Burned cards can sit safely in rest. This makes burn much weaker than passive-tick interpretation.

Kitse mass burn (Activa: quema todos rivales) is strong for mark placement, but burned cards only take 1dmg when they ATTACK. Opponent can choose not to attack with burned cards. Counter: force attacks or use other damage sources.

Establo Morfeico is END OF TURN EFFECT damage (not attack), so it fires every turn regardless of 1-attack rule. This makes Establo relatively stronger in 1-attack-per-turn format — it provides free damage every turn while your 1 attack handles combat.

Antoine Graham Activa (2dmg x3) is used via Vinculo Odemico. The turn you use Vinculo, NO cards in ZP can attack. So Antoine turn = 2dmg x3 but zero combat damage. Must alternate between Antoine turns and attack turns.
Necroalga Abisal can only be equipped to the card that attacked this turn. Cannot equip T1 to any card without attacking. First equip = T1 after first attack.
